commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Take the rod, and gather you the assembly together, you, and Aaron your brother, and speak unto the rock before their eyes; and it shall give forth its water, and you shall bring forth to them water out of the rock: so you shall give the congregation and their animals drink. The rod, with which Moses had wrought so many miracles, and which was placed in the tabernacle, ver. It is called his rod, in the Hebrews v. We do not find that the rod of Aaron, which budded, was used to work miracles. Septuagint, "you. "Both Moses and Aaron concurred in the action, (ver. 12,) but Moses was the chief agent.
